name_en: New Arrival 🅰️🅰️CE Arc de Triomphe Kelly Bag 👜
name_cn:
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️CE Arc de Triomphe Kelly Bag 👜
New Arc de Triomphe pouch, full of sophistication!
Simple and exquisite silhouette, whether it is the steady black, low-key brown, classic monogram, etc... all exude incomparable sophistication ❤️ The Kelly classic lines are simple and generous, no need for extra decoration, showing aesthetic charm immediately 🫶🏻
Style No.: 118113
Size: 20.5x13x8 (with original packaging)
